You are working on the recommendations-service NestJS repo at /Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/recommendations-service.

Follow this COMPLETE workflow for Jira task RECO-681:

## Step 1: Get ATLASSIAN_CLOUD_ID
```bash
grep ATLASSIAN_CLOUD_ID .env | cut -d'=' -f2
```
Use getJiraIssue MCP tool with that cloud ID and key "RECO-681" to understand which files/rules to fix.

## Step 2: Create branch from current branch (NOT main)
```bash
git checkout -b RECO-681-<kebab-case-summary>
```

## Step 3: Run ESLint on target files to see violations
```bash
npm run lint -- --max-warnings=0 path/to/file.ts
```

## Step 4: Fix ESLint violations
- Run `npm run lint:fix` first for auto-fixes
- Then fix remaining manually
- Most common fix: named object params pattern:
  ```typescript
  // ❌ function myFn(id: string, name: string): void {}
  // ✅ function myFn({ id, name }: { id: string; name: string }): void {}
  ```
- NO COMMENTS in code
- Use path aliases only (no relative imports)
- Explicit return types required

## Step 5: Fix ALL callers of changed functions (CRITICAL)
Use Grep tool to find every call site across src/ and test/. Update every caller to use new object param syntax. Do NOT use rest-spread `{ ...param }` shortcut.

Check: same module controllers/services, other modules importing this service, CLI commands in src/modules/cli/, scripts in src/scripts/, test files.

## Step 6: Fix tests
Update mock calls AND assertions in unit-spec.ts and e2e-spec.ts files to match new signatures.
Run: `npm run test:coverage`
Do NOT stop until all tests pass.

## Step 7: Verify
```bash
npm run lint
npm run type-check
```
Both must pass.

## Step 8: Commit and push
```bash
git add <specific files only, no git add -A>
git commit -m "RECO-681: <imperative mood description>"
git push -u origin <branch-name>
```

## Step 9: Create PR
Use `gh pr create`. Check the PR template at .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md first. 
- Title: "RECO-681: <short description>"
- Target branch: the branch this was cut FROM (check with `git log --oneline -5` to see base)
- Fill the PR template properly

Return the PR URL when done.
